forbidden_capabilities: pull-request, push, schedule or non-owner-triggered source build
build from mutable branch, release-only reference, short commit or prebuilt binary
persisted checkout credentials, repository write permission, secret or OIDC access
execution of configure or build argv by the verifier
committed source archive, checkout, build log or compiled binary
model download, conversion, quantization, benchmark or admission claim
production readiness or operational attestation claim
acceptance: workflow is exact-main, repository-owner-only and issue 2832 command-bound
official llama.cpp commit aedb2a5e9ca3d4064148bbb919e0ddc0c1b70ab3 is checked out without persisted credentials
workflow executes the exact AP-13B.2a configure and four-target build argv
collector and verifier run against the accepted authority without executing manifest commands
source archive, checkout, environment, commands, logs and all four binaries enter one deterministic external package
uploaded package is restored and independently verified before a locator artifact is emitted
artifacts are uniquely named, immutable, SHA-256-bound and retained for 90 days
this slice introduces no committed build observation and does not close issue 2832
Ruff, strict mypy, full pytest/coverage, workflow security and exact-head CI pass
